bio: 荷西·奧特嘉·加塞特（西班牙語：José Ortega y Gasset，1883年5月9日—1955年10月18日），簡稱奧特嘉，是一位西班牙哲學家、報業從業員及評論家。其哲學思想主要圍繞存在主義、歷史哲學和對西班牙文化的批判。
bio_en: José Ortega y Gasset ( or-TAY-gə, Spanish: [xoˈse oɾˈteɣa j ɣaˈset]; 9 May 1883 – 18 October 1955) was a Spanish philosopher and essayist. He worked during the first half of the 20th century while Spain oscillated between monarchy, republicanism and dictatorship. His philosophy has been characterized as a "philosophy of life" that "comprised a long-hidden beginning in a pragmatist metaphysics inspired by William James and with a general method from a realist phenomenology imitating Edmund Husserl, which served both his proto-existentialism (prior to Martin Heidegger's) and his realist historicism, which has been compared to both Wilhelm Dilthey and Benedetto Croce."
